summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: Testimonials, Contact Form, and FAQ Management. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend components verified: Testimonials section with 'Partager votre expérience' button, Contact form with success message, FAQ accordion with 4 questions. Admin CMS sidebar shows 'Témoignages' and 'FAQ' menu items. Minor issue: Admin panel navigation redirects to homepage after login (auth state not persisting on route change).

integration_issues.issue: After login, navigating to /admin redirects to homepage. Auth state may not be persisting correctly on route change.

passed_tests: GET /api/testimonials - returns approved testimonials (public, no auth)
POST /api/testimonials - user submits testimonial with auth
POST /api/contact - public contact form submission (no auth required)
PUT /api/admin/contacts/{id}/read - admin marks contact as read
Admin FAQs GET endpoint requires authentication
Admin FAQs POST endpoint requires authentication
Frontend: Testimonials section renders with 'Partager votre expérience' button
Frontend: Contact form submits successfully and shows success message
Frontend: FAQ section displays 4 questions with accordion
Frontend: Admin CMS has 'Témoignages' and 'FAQ' in sidebar menu
action_items: Investigate admin panel navigation issue - auth state not persisting when navigating to /admin route after login
critical_code_review_comments: All 3 new features (Testimonials, Contact Form, FAQ) backend APIs implemented correctly
Contact form POST /api/contact correctly does NOT require authentication
Testimonials POST /api/testimonials correctly DOES require authentication
FAQ management uses site_settings collection with upsert pattern
Admin CMS sidebar includes new menu items: Témoignages, Contacts, FAQ
TestimonialsManager, ContactsManager, FAQManager components exist in AdminCMS.jsx

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Components verified, admin navigation has minor issue)

test_credentials.test_user: Created during testing with random email

seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up: TEST_ prefixed testimonials and contact messages
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new features tested: 1) Testimonials - users can submit (requires login), admin can approve/reject/delete. 2) Contact form - public submission (no auth), stored in DB. 3) FAQ management - admin CRUD via POST /api/admin/faqs. All backend APIs working. Frontend components exist. Minor issue: Admin panel (/admin) redirects to homepage after login - may need to check ProtectedRoute component or auth state persistence.

contact_form.public_submit: No auth required, stores in contact_messages collection
